channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Suzuki and Sabathia among 14 newcomers on baseball Hall of Fame ballot. Wagner tops holdovers
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — Outfielder Ichiro Suzuki and pitcher CC Sabathia are among 14 new candidates on the Hall of Fame ballot released Monday, joining 14 holdovers led by reliever Billy Wagner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minute Maid Park in Houston will soon be renamed Daikin Park under new business partnership
item.description: The Houston Astros’ home will get a new name on Jan. 1, becoming Daikin Park under an agreement through the 2039 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Ahmed Humble, KPRC 2

item.title: Monday Morning Lights: Pittsburg vs. De La Salle, let the hype begin
item.description: Los Gatos got 'some 2014 vibes' from former QB before win over Serra. Amador Valley doesn't settle for one when two is an option. Wilcox coach guards against overconfidence as Chargers move into CCS semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appears to break out Trump's dance move during tournament
item.description: English LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appeared to join the line of professional athletes who pulled off President-elect Donald Trump's dance move over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants bench QB Daniel Jones and will start Tommy DeVito vs. the Bucs, AP source says
item.description: The New York Giants are benching struggling quarterback Daniel Jones and will start fan favorite Tommy DeVito against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers this week in an attempt to break a five-game losing streak, according to a person with knowledge of the decision.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: F1 to move Canadian Grand Prix slot on calendar in drive to cut travel
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Formula 1 will move the Canadian Grand Prix to a new slot in May from 2026 in an effort to cut down on travel and its environmental impact.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CFL Grey Cup ref makes rookie mistake at coin toss
item.description: Canadian Football League referee Ben Major suffered a faux pas during the coin toss of the Grey Cup on Sunday between the Toronto Argonauts and the Winnipeg Blue Bombers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giants to bench Daniel Jones for Week 12: reports
item.description: New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones will move to QB2 for Week 12 against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, according to multiple reports on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Detroit Lions acquisition channels Pistons’ championship spirit in stellar debut
item.description: New Detroit Lions acquisition Za’Darius Smith channeled former Detroit Pistons star Rasheed Wallace in his stellar debut as he brought the same championship spirit the city felt 20 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Trump support dominates weekend in sports as athletes perform president-elect's dance moves
item.description: Support for President-elect Donald Trump was on full display across the entire weekend as athletes performed his dance moves during matches and games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers beat Bengals 34-27 on Dobbins' late TD after squandering 21-point lead
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jim Harbaugh and the Los Angeles Chargers finally have their signature win. Even if it ended up being a white-knuckle finish. The Chargers squandered a 21-point third-quarter lead Sunday night against the Cincinnati Bengals before J.K.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers talks 'cool' Trump celebration; team curiously ends press session right after: report
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers took a moment to explain why he performed Donald Trump's dance move after a touchdown. The team raised eyebrows with its next move.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jordan Love runs for go-ahead TD and Packers beat Bears on Karl Brooks' FG block at buzzer
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Jordan Love and the Green Bay Packers made just enough plays to squeeze out yet another win over the Chicago Bears. This time, it took a late touchdown and a blocked field goal.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers take command of AFC North with win over Ravens
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers hung on for a two-point win against their division rival the Baltimore Ravens on Sunday, 18-16. The Steelers are clearly in first place.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-MLB star Jonathan Lucroy calls for voter ID requirement in elections
item.description: Former MLB star Jonathan Lucroy called for an identification requirement to be able to vote in elections. He had a discussion on social media about it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU suffers first loss of season to Kansas, 17-13
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU still has a great shot at the Big 12 Championship Game, but the Cougars undefeated season came to an end Saturday night against Kansas. Jalon Daniels threw for 169 yards, Dylan Neal ran for two touchdowns and Kansas upset No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes get run over by #17 Colorado, 49-24
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes losing streak continues, with no end in sight. Shedeur Sanders overcame a shaky start to throw three touchdown passes, LaJohntay Wester returned a punt 76 yards for a score and No. 18 Colorado pulled away late to beat Utah 49-24 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Goalkeeper Olivia Bodmer leads Rutgers back to NCAA tournament
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PIX11) – Rutgers women's soccer will host UConn in the opening round of the NCAA tournament on Saturday. This is the Scarlet Knights’ 13th consecutive appearance in the tournament, but how they got there was something Rutgers nation had never seen before.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Yankees name Dave Sims new radio play-by-play voice
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The New York Yankees have officially named a new play-by-play voice. Veteran broadcaster Dave Sims will replace John Sterling, who says he’s officially retired for good after a brief return to call playoff games.
item.dc:creator: Kate Rooney, PIX 11

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah athletic director fined $40,000 by Big 12 Conference
item.description: The Big 12 fine is considered stiff, as the three athletic director fines of note in the past decade were all $25,000.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, NewsNation
